candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue total and matches net sales values exactly.

candidates.why: Not revenue; cost/amortization item.
COGS, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not total revenue.
Liability, not top-line revenue.
Liability, not top-line revenue.

candidates.why: Explicit COGS line; preferred direct production/service cost row.
Also a valid COGS label, but appears duplicative of Cost of goods sold.

candidates.row_label: Finished goods and goods for resale
candidates.why: Inventory asset, not income statement COGS expense.

candidates.why: Only a subcomponent of COGS, not full COGS.

candidates.why: Balancing row; should not be preferred over explicit reported COGS.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component.
Clear SG&A overhead component.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in SGA
candidates.why: Excluded by rule because amortization should not be part of XSGA components.
Balance sheet liability, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected the two best overhead components and excluded depreciation/amortization subcomponents per instructions.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; best match.

candidates.why: Explicit reported interest expense line; best match.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest subcomponent, not preferred over broader interest expense.
Generic interest expense label that may be used in some periods, though blank in preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest detail, not preferred over broader interest expense.
Balancing row, not preferred when explicit interest expense exists.

variables.notes: Provided a priority list for possible label variation over time, preferring the explicit reported interest expense row and then the generic alternate label.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the Parent Companys shareholders
candidates.why: Best book equity measure because it excludes non-controlling interests.
Valid only as fallback if no parent/owner equity line exists; here it duplicates the parent equity line.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the Parent Companys shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation label, but MIB should preferably come from balance sheet.
Income statement allocation label, but MIB should preferably come from balance sheet.
Correct balance sheet line for minority interest / NCI.
Also a valid balance sheet minority-interest label, but less preferred than the clearer NCI wording.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet non-controlling interest line. It appears unpopulated in preview, but presence of the row indicates it may exist in some period; this avoids using total equity for BE and preserves BE+MIB structure.
